about.intro: A developer who grows by *building, testing, and improving* real projects.
about.description: With a *frontend development-focused* mindset, I design user flows and screen structures, using React and Next.js to build **intuitive interfaces** and ***maintainable components***.
about.full:
I am a developer who grows by building and improving real projects.

I mainly work with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS to create web interfaces and user experiences. I try not to stop at making a screen visible, but to write code with clear component structure and understandable data flow.

When working on a project, I first think about how users move through the service, then design an interface that supports that flow. I am also interested in building structures that remain easy to maintain as features grow.

My goal is to work on larger services that solve real user problems, while growing into a developer who understands not only frontend development but also backend systems and product structure.

projects.intro: A collection of *web services* and *experimental projects* that I designed and built.

items.title: ScholarMate
items.description: A web application that helps users explore scholarship information and find opportunities that match their needs.

items.description: A collection of small features and UI experiments created during my learning process.

roadmap.description: A short timeline of what I have learned and the direction I want to grow in.

items.description: I started learning the structure and behavior of web pages with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
I built component-based interfaces with React and learned how to manage state and user interactions.
I am building more structured web applications with Next.js and TypeScript.
